labelsPage.title: QR Labels
labelsPage.subtitle: Print-friendly label sheet. Field:
labelsPage.tipMultiselect: Tip: use Ctrl/⌘ to select multiple.
labelsPage.scanSubtitle: Uses your PC camera if supported.
labelsPage.scannerNotSupportedDesc: Camera scanning is not available in this browser/environment. It usually requires a secure context (https or http://localhost) and camera permission. Try the latest Chrome/Edge (desktop or mobile) and open the app via http://localhost. You can still print labels without scanning.
labelsPage.emptyHint: Select at least one record to generate labels.
